title: Stop perfecting your prompt. Do this instead
summary: Jeff Su argues that AI practitioners should move beyond perfecting prompts and instead focus on context engineering: assembling background, examples, and constraints. The video explains three related concepts: grounding (providing documents for reference), RAG (retrieving sources before generating), and context engineering (broader than prompt engineering).
